methodology.recommendation: first actionable BET/LEAN observation, otherwise opening
methodology.line_clv: side-normalized recommendation value minus closing value; positive is favorable
methodology.odds_clv: closing implied probability minus recommendation implied probability
methodology.market_efficiency: CLV, odds movement, and observation lead-time proxy
